vehicles.notes: 3rd gen Tundra (2022+) only. NOT compatible with 2nd gen (2007–2021).

fitment_notes: 3rd-generation Toyota Tundra (2022–2025). New body style — 2nd gen covers do not fit. Two sizes: 5.5ft (Double Cab) and 6.5ft (Double Cab long bed / CrewMax).
target_queries: tonneau cover for 2022 Toyota Tundra 3rd gen
roll up tonneau cover new Tundra CrewMax
